data.title: Bitcoin Could Hit $1 Million By 2035 If Store Of Value Market Grows, Says Bitwise's Matt Hougan
data.description: According to Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan, Bitcoin (BTC) has the potential to reach $1 million by 2035 if the store of value market continues to grow at the same rate it has for the past two decades. Hougan believes that Bitcoin is moving towards long-term institutional adoption, fueled by the growth of ETFs, geopolitical instability, and increasing demand for a "digital gold" asset. He predicts that if Bitcoin captures 15%-17% of the global store-of-value market (currently at 6%), it could achieve seven-figure valuations. This projection hinges on various factors contributing to the cryptocurrency's growth trajectory. More detailed information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stocks rise for third consecutive week fueled by optimism on easing tensions over Iran war and strong earnings.
data.description: Investors have seen a notable three-week streak of growth in the S&P 500, driven by positive sentiment surrounding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and impressive corporate earnings. This upward trend culminated in a rise on Friday, marking a significant climb for the index.

data.title: Kaltura to Showcase Agentic Revenue Engagement Platform at Adobe Summit 2026, Demonstrating How Agentic AI Avatars and Content Intelligence Turn Static ABM Pages Into Real-Time Conversations
data.description: Kaltura has introduced a new integrated platform after acquiring PathFactory, focusing on intelligent rich content creation, journey orchestration, and revenue engagement. This unveiling took place at Adobe Summit in Las Vegas, showcasing the synergy between the two companies. The platform aims to enhance user interactions and boost revenue generation using agentic avatar technology. This move signifies a strategic shift for Kaltura towards a more comprehensive content creation and management solution. The unveiling at Adobe Summit signals a significant move by Kaltura, indicating its commitment to innovation and market expansion.

data.title: Dogecoin Jumps 6% As 'Gold-Backed DOGE' Plan Emerges
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has surged by 6% following a period of closing above $0.10 for the first time in weeks. This increase comes after Dogecoin Cash Inc. revealed plans to introduce Dogecoin Gold, a forthcoming token that would connect digital assets to physical gold reserves. The proposal entails a system where one billion tokens would equate to one gram of physical gold. Tokens would only be generated when gold is secured in custody and eliminated from circulation upon verified redemption. The management stated, "We are examining a framework that aims to merge provable ownership of physical gold with blockchain-based audibility and precision. The objective is to explore the feasibility of establishing a system where tangible assets, precisely defined units, and transparent digital infrastructure function within a disciplined and verifiable setting." Currently, the initiative is still in the developmental phase, with no tokens issued or a specified timeline for implementation.

data.title: European premiere of LEPAS in Milan showcases elegance merging with mobility artistry.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is set to grow at a rate of 5.6% in the upcoming year, with total global GDP expected to reach $96 trillion by the end of the year. The report also highlights that emerging markets are projected to experience the highest growth rates, with an estimated increase of 7.1%. In contrast, advanced economies are forecasted to grow at a slower pace of 2.7%. This disparity in growth rates is attributed to various factors such as vaccination rates, government stimulus packages, and structural differences in economies. Additionally, inflation rates are expected to rise across all regions, with an average global inflation rate of 3.9%. Overall, the report paints a positive economic outlook for the global economy in the near future.

data.title: AMD Stock Is In Blue Sky Territory — Charts Say Don't Chase It
data.description: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD) reached close to $278 on Friday, hovering just below a recent 52-week peak of $279.50, marking a notable increase of over 30% since the beginning of the year. Following a closing price of $278.26 on Thursday, a new record high, the stock is now in uncharted territory with no previous resistance levels. Despite indicating a strong bullish trend, caution is advised as some indicators suggest that the stock may be entering a late-stage phase. AMD is currently trading significantly above key moving averages, with the 20-day moving average surpassing the 50-day and 200-day SMAs. The stock is trading at approximately 37% above its 200-day moving average, indicating an overextended position. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

HORMUZ TRAFFIC BARELY MOVING BEFORE REOPENING Just before Iran said the Strait of Hormuz would reopen, ship traffic remained extremely limited. Only a handful of vessels were moving, including a Greek-owned supertanker exiting the Gulf and a Pakistan-flagged tanker completing its outbound journey.

data.title: Rove Expands Ice Packs Line With Three New, Triple-Infused Pre-Roll Strains Ahead of 4/20
data.description: In time for the 420 celebrations, renowned cannabis brand Rove from COSTA MESA, Calif. announced the release of three new Ice Packs strains across six states. The brand, recognized for its quality products such as the award-winning Diamond Vapes and triple-infused Ice Packs pre-rolls, is introducing these new potent flavors. These strains are set to bring innovation and excitement to the market.

data.title: Arcadia Capital Expands West Coast Presence with Senior Hire of Josh Ruder
data.description: Miami-based investment firm Arcadia Capital has recently appointed Josh Ruder as Managing Director, enhancing its senior advisory team. Ruder, who will be located in Los Angeles, will focus on technology and tech-enabled services companies in the global M&A and growth capital markets. With over 10 years of experience encompassing strategic M&A, private equity investment, and tech-focused advisory, Ruder joins Arcadia Capital from AIM Equity, strengthening the firm's expertise in these areas.

data.title: Statement from OCI Global
data.description: OCI Global N.V. (OCI), listed on Euronext, announced the convocation notice for its 2026 Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 2, 2026. The statement highlighted developments since the appointment of the Enterprise.
